chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D — 1548 of 2021. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.11.2021. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR HEARING OF M.A. 7416/2021. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. ------ Mr. Waqar Ali Leghari Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Fayyaz Hussain Sabki A.P.G. Mr. Mashooque Ali Mahar Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General Sindh. ---------- Petitioner No.1 Mst. Sajida present along with her parents and categorically states that she is residing with her parents and that her husband has lodged false FIR vide crime No.48 of 2021, under sections 365, 452, 506(ii), 147, 148, 149 PPC, at Police Station Dilbar Khan. It is stated that in fact no such incident has taken place. Mst. Sajida denied the allegations leveled by her husband against her parents. In view of the above, the Investigating Officer of the aforesaid crime is directed to record the statement of Mst. Sajida and submit the report/summary before the concerned Judicial Magistrate who will pass appropriate order in accordance with law. The petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE A.
